Change Schoology Notifications Settings

This will help you change the Notifications Settings so Schoology does not send them to your email

✍️ Made by Jon F.

1

Click the Account button

2

Click the "Settings" button

3

Click the "Notifications" link

4

Here you can individually turn off notifications OR click the "Turn Off All Notifications" (Red)

5

Scroll to the bottom and hit Save

💡

Reminder

This will keep notifications from being sent to your email. If you would rather filter the emails head to the Guides list and use those directions

Made with StepSnap
